title: Boards query is not accepting pageInt argument
excerpt:
Unable to query for boards in a paginated setup. The documentation says 
  
Where as the API call is returning with a message: Field ‘boards’ doesn’t accept argument ‘pageInt’

posts.author: rangamannarv (Rangamannar Vadigepalli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unable to query for boards in a paginated setup. The documentation says

image816×267 20.5 KB

Where as the API call is returning with a message: Field ‘boards’ doesn’t accept argument ‘pageInt’

image807×648 34.4 KB

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Rangamannar!

Sorry, that’s a typo in our docs. I’ve gone ahead and updated it. The correct argument is page and the type is Int. Somehow they both got combined into one word.

posts.author: rangamannarv (Rangamannar Vadigepalli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you very much @dipro
This solves some major issues
